title: Hideaway+
description: A mod that adds tweaks for playing on the Hideaway Minecraft server!
body:
![Hideaway+ logo](https://i.imgur.com/JiSO1qN.png)
For playing on playhideaway.com!
# Features - Automatically dump inventory items into shops to sell! - Highlights items in your inventory with their rarity color! - **Icons** for your friends and other Hideaway+ players in usernames! - **Discord Rich Presence** which displays your location on Hideaway as your status! - Fully customizeable **config & keybinds**!
Other features and tweaks... - Jukebox feature to play Hideaway original tracks
- Shows the XP percentage above your hotbar
- Shows your skin in your wardrobe instead of a Steve variant
- Adds keybinds for friends list, luggage, wardrobe, profile, mail, palm plate, & journal
- Adds a setting to disable cosmetics
- Adds a setting to disable ambient sounds & activity songs
- Hides your backpack when in first person -- no more seeing it out of the corner of your eye!
- Hides capes on players who are wearing a backpack.
## **Disclaimer** **DISCLAIMER:** This mod utilizes a third-party API for the purpose of logging active players. The API sends data to the following pages: - [https://ä.day/api/users/](https://ä.day/api/users/) - [https://ä.day/api/users/team](https://ä.day/api/users/team) Please note that the information collected by the API is never stored beyond the duration of the API's operation. All data is automatically cleared every 20 seconds. If you are interested in examining the API's functionality, you can find the source code and more information [here](https://github.com/Voxxin/hideawayplus-api). By using this mod, you consent to the data collection and understand that the information collected is solely for the purpose of tracking active players within the game. We take your privacy seriously and assure you that your data is treated with the utmost care and is not used for any other purposes.
